# The Single Entity

> *I want to be alone.*
>
> Attributed to Greta Garbo

#### Learning Objectives {.unnumbered}

Students completing this chapter will be able to

-   model a single entity;

-   define a single database;

-   write queries for a single-table database.

##  {.unnumbered}

```{r, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, suppressWarnings()}
library(DBI)
library(RMySQL)
db <- dbConnect(RMySQL::MySQL(),
                  dbname = "Text",
                  host = "localhost",
                  user="student",
                  password = "student")
```


```{sql}
#| eval: T
#| max.print: -1
#| connection: db
SELECT * FROM share;
```
